mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher (teacher_no, teacher_name, office, title, phone, email) VALUES (#{teacherNo}, #{teacherName}, #{office}, #{title}, #{phone}, #{email})
mapper.update: UPDATE teacher SET teacher_name=#{teacherName}, office=#{office}, title=#{title}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, update_time=NOW() WHERE teacher_id=#{teacherId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher WHERE 1=1
AND (teacher_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR teacher_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR office LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
